failures.msg: [HIPAA-164.312(a)(2)(iv)] [GAP-01] aws_s3_bucket.uploads: S3 bucket storing PHI must use SSE-KMS with a customer-managed key, not SSE-S3. Remediation: add aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration with sse_algorithm=aws:kms.

[HIPAA-164.312(a)(2)(iv)] [GAP-02] aws_dynamodb_table.intake: DynamoDB table storing PHI must use a customer-managed KMS key. Remediation: add server_side_encryption { enabled = true kms_key_arn = ... }.
[HIPAA-164.312(e)(1)] [GAP-03] aws_s3_bucket.uploads: S3 bucket must deny non-TLS requests. Remediation: add aws_s3_bucket_policy with Deny on aws:SecureTransport=false.

[HIPAA-164.308(a)(7)] [GAP-04] aws_s3_bucket.uploads: S3 bucket storing PHI must have versioning enabled. PHI overwrites must be recoverable. Remediation: add aws_s3_bucket_versioning with status=Enabled.
[HIPAA-164.312(e)(1)] [GAP-05] aws_lambda_function.intake: Lambda function processing PHI must run inside a VPC. Remediation: add vpc_config with private subnet IDs and a security group.
